response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive fullstack development experience and technical versatility, with strong TypeScript, React, and database skills. However, his senior-level background and focus on advanced topics (e.g., AI agents, high-performance systems) may exceed the junior/mid-level scope, though his open-source contributions and renewable-energy-adjacent projects (e.g., GISCollective) align well with the role's domain.
strengths: Proven TypeScript/React expertise across multiple roles and projects (e.g., Pinepoint Systems, Northwind Labs).
Relevant domain experience with geo-data platforms and open-source tools for NGOs/sustainability (GISCollective).
Strong architectural mindset and collaboration skills, evidenced by workshops, talks, and team leadership.
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role; may seek higher seniority or compensation.
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL (only 'SQL' listed) or Nest.js experience.
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his entrepreneurial/open-source work flexibility.
